rule_metadata.name: NTLM_Dump_Output
rule_metadata.description: NTML Hash Dump output file - John/LC format
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule NTLM_Dump_Output
{
	meta:
		description = "NTML Hash Dump output file - John/LC format"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		date = "2015-10-01"
		score = 75

	strings:
		$s0 = "500:AAD3B435B51404EEAAD3B435B51404EE:" ascii
		$s1 = "500:aad3b435b51404eeaad3b435b51404ee:" ascii

	condition:
		1 of them
}
